tagline: Share Genie Space with all account users: The share modal now includes an option to share your Genie Space with all account users.
what_it_does: Share Genie Space with all account users: The share modal now includes an option to share your Genie Space with all account users. SQL download settings for full query results: The APIs to download full query results now respect workspace level settings for SQL downloads. Create, share, and manage a Genie Agent, the natural language chat interface that business users use to ask questions of their data in Databricks.
why_it_matters: Before sharing the agent with users, Databricks recommends adding example SQL queries, instructions, and knowledge store configurations to improve response accuracy.
key_takeaway: Share Genie Space with all account users: The share modal now includes an option to share your Genie Space with all account users.
